options: Hundreds of people died because of the typhoon.

options: We’ll start serving the meal soon.

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: What is the article mainly about?
options: A commercial of a popular TV program.
How criminal science help police identify the victim and criminal.
The ways DNA influenced entertaining industry.
An introduction of a well-known science fiction.

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: According to this article, what is CSI?
options: It’s an organization which belongs to the US government.
It’s a science method to identify the criminal.

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Which of the following words has the closest meaning to the word “ crucial ” in this passage?

questions.subject: 英文

options: gathered samples of blood, hair and finger prints
tried to find the victim’s dead body

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Based on the passage, which of the following about DNA is true?
options: DNA can only be found when someone is alive.
DNA can be evidence to prove a person’s innocence.

Scientists like to do experiments with animals’ DNA. ▲ 閱讀下文後,作答第 37-41 題 Shakespeare’s famous play “ The Merchant of Venice ” contains many different themes. One of the clearest is that women can be just as capable as men, and often more so. Portia pretends to be a man, speaks in defense of Antonio and even saves his life by getting the Duke of Venice to rule in his favor.

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Which of the following is NOT suggested by the passage?
options: The Merchant of Venice has only two different themes.
The Merchant of Venice is about human relationships.
The Duke of Venice is a man with a lot of power.
Shakespeare felt women and men are equal in terms of capability.

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: From the passage, we can guess that Antonio.
options: has a great deal of money
wants to get revenge on Shylock
is in involved in a court case

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: What does Portia probably say to the man who wants to marry her?
options: You need to speak in my defense.
You need to be a very rich man.
You have to make the correct choice.
You have to give me gold or silver.

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Shakespeare uses Portia and Bassanio to.
options: show us that money isn’t everything
point out that most people are unhappy
explain why Nerissa is so jealous

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: What can we learn about Nerissa from the passage?
options: She believes that the rich can also be miserable.
She believes that the rich are much happier than the poor.
